payload.metrics_note: Illustrative cached values. Louder and tenser output clips more; the target metric improved and a safety metric got worse.
payload.media_provenance: Both clips synthesized locally by tools/make_media.py (same motif, two arrangements); not model output.
payload.note: The same conceptual chain the text page runs for real: pairs in, adapter out, eval always. Here every element is a reviewed cached illustration, because live audio training is impractical in the room; the card says which parts are real files and which are illustrative numbers.
